title: In Development and implementation of the ERP platform, the SMART-approach is used in step:

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
In Development and implementation of the ERP platform, the SMART-approach is used in step:

Identify and engage interested parties

Explore the current state of affairs

Define the goals and objectives of the project

Help developers understand your business

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
requirements

Prioritize objectives and set realistic timelines

Create an action plan and assign responsibilities

Implement, test, and evaluate the platform

Train employees and provide ongoing support and maintenance

Continuous improvement and adaptation to changes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
The benefit to get Supplier price lists:

analyze your contracts profitability

make smarter purchase decisions

select different replenishment methods

check your order status form within the app

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
The correct benefits of obtaining supplier price lists are:

1. Analyze your contracts profitability: By obtaining price lists from suppliers, you can compare prices and identify the most cost-effective options. This enables you to analyze the profitability of your contracts and make informed decisions about future procurement.

2. Make smarter purchase decisions: With access to accurate and up-to-date price information, you can make smarter purchase decisions and negotiate better deals with suppliers. This can lead to significant cost savings and better value for money.

3. Select different replenishment methods: By analyzing supplier price lists, you can determine the most appropriate replenishment methods for your business. For instance, you may choose to order items in bulk to take advantage of lower prices, or opt for just-in-time delivery to reduce inventory costs.

4. Check your order status from within the app: Many ERP platforms allow you to view and track your order status directly from within the system. By obtaining supplier price lists, you can ensure that you have accurate information on the availability and delivery times of the products you need.

Overall, obtaining supplier price lists is a key component of effective procurement management and can help your business to reduce costs, improve efficiency, and make better purchasing decisions.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
conduct an audit of your company's business processes. If something needs to be standardized and / or modernized, do it before starting work on ERP.”; This task in step:

Define the goal

Explore the current state of affairs

Identify and engage interested parties

Help developers understand your business

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
requirements

The task "conduct an audit of your company's business processes. If something needs to be standardized and / or modernized, do it before starting work on ERP" would fall under the step of "Explore the current state of affairs." This step involves analyzing and evaluating the existing business processes, systems, and technologies to identify areas for improvement and determine what needs to be done before implementing the new ERP platform. By conducting an audit of the company's business processes, any necessary standardization or modernization can be addressed before starting work on the ERP, ensuring a smoother implementation process.
